top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
    ss_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk
FROM 
    store_sales
WHERE 
    ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_month_seq >= 1200 AND d_month_seq <= 1200
    )
INTERSECT
SELECT 
    ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
    ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk
FROM 
    web_sales
WHERE 
    ws_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_month_seq >= 1200 AND d_month_seq <= 1200
    )
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
    d_month_seq
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
INTERSECT
SELECT 
    ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
    d_month_seq
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
LIMIT 100;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
    ss_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk
FROM 
    store_sales
WHERE 
    ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_month_seq >= 1200 AND d_month_seq <= 1200
    )
INTERSECT
SELECT 
    ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
    ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk
FROM 
    web_sales
WHERE 
    ws_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_month_seq >= 1200 AND d_month_seq <= 1200
    )
LIMIT 100
